h1: Heat & Glo's Collaboration with Military Makeover: A Heartwarming Partnership for Veterans
h2: Can an Electric Fireplace Warm a Room?

paragraphs: Heat & Glo is proud to partner with Military Makeover with Montel Williams, a Lifetime® program dedicated to giving back to the brave men and women of the U.S. military. Hosted by Navy veteran and military advocate Montel Williams, Military Makeover brings together designers, decorators, home renovation experts, and key brand partners to transform the homes—and lives—of military families.

In a recent four-part miniseries, Heat & Glo had the honor of contributing to the home renovation of the Jones family, a military family facing the challenges that many veterans experience when they return to civilian life. With their commitment to creating warmth, comfort, and beauty in homes across America, Heat & Glo gave the Jones family one of their most innovative products—the Inception fireplace.The Inception fireplace represents the pinnacle of electric fireplace technology. Featuring DigitalSpark™ technology, it allows homeowners to choose from multiple fire backdrops for a fully customizable experience. The fireplace also comes equipped with built-in sound effects that enhance the ambiance of any room. Whether it’s the crackling of a fire or the gentle hum of a peaceful evening, the Inception provides a sensory experience that helps create a cozy, welcoming environment.

Heat & Glo's partnership with Military Makeover is about more than just the fireplace—it's a heartfelt contribution to a mission that seeks to give back to those who have sacrificed for our freedom. By providing the Jones family with an Inception fireplace, Heat & Glo hopes to create a space where warmth and togetherness thrive, a true reflection of the gratitude we feel toward our military community.

This collaboration with Military Makeover is one of many ways that Heat & Glo continues to support veterans and their families, ensuring that their homes are as comfortable and inviting as the lives they’ve fought to protect.
Electric fireplaces offer more than just a cozy glow! Discover their true heating capabilities.
